flavor: "I am Hulkling, the Young Avengers' resident shape- changer."
name: Hulkling
text: Descendant of Both Races — Response: After you play a card with the [[kree]] or [[skrull]] trait from your hand, if you share that trait, draw 1 card. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "So I'm half-Kree, half-Skrull?"
name: Teddy Altman
text: Kree/Skrull Hybrid — Setup: Put your origin form upgrade into play, Skrull Origin side faceup. Response: After you change origin form, heal 1 damage from Teddy Altman.

name: Kree Origin
text: Origin form. Permanent. Hulkling gains the [[kree]] trait. Action: Exhaust this card → flip this card. Response: After you spend a [[skrull]] card, exhaust this card → draw 1 card.

name: Skrull Origin
text: Origin form. Permanent. Hulkling gains the [[skrull]] trait. Action: Exhaust this card → flip this card. Response: After you spend a card with the [[kree]] trait, exhaust this card → draw 1 card.

flavor: “You picked the wrong gays to mess with!”
name: Wiccan
text:
While you have the [[kree]] trait, Wiccan gets +1 ATK.
While you have the [[skrull]] trait, Wiccan gets +1 THW.

flavor: "Yeah, these guys aren't as scary without their guns." —Hulkling
name: Kree Durability
text: Hero Response: After you change form, ready Hulkling and give him a tough status card.

flavor: "I dont Hulk-out, if that's what you mean. At least not any more than most sixteen-year-olds." —Hulkling
name: Kree Ferocity
text: Hero Interrupt: When you make a basic attack, you get +6 ATK for that attack. You may take 2 indirect damage → that attack gains overkill.

flavor: "Wow...it worked. I can't believe it." —Hulkling
name: Shift and Strike
text: Hero Response (attack): After you change form, deal 4 damage to an enemy. If you have the [[skrull]] trait, confuse that enemy. If you have the [[kree]] trait, stun that enemy.

flavor: "I guess it's the Skrull part of me." —Hulkling
name: Skrull Infiltration
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. You may take 2 indirect damage → this thwart ignores the patrol keyword and the crisis icon ([crisis]).

flavor: "Almost healed...that doesn't mean it doesn't hurt." —Hulkling
name: Skrull Regeneration
text: Hero Action: Ready Hulkling. Heal 2 damage from Hulkling for each resource you overpaid for this card.

flavor: “Male Kree children are conscripted at age nine. Taken and trained to be the best soldiers in all the universe."
name: Alliance
text: Response: After you play a card with the [[kree]] trait from your hand, deal 1 damage to an enemy. Response: After you play a card with the [[skrull]] trait from your hand, remove 1 threat from the main scheme.

flavor: “She would have been a powerful leader...might well have brought peace to our warring races." —Mar-Vell
name: Ancestors
text: Uses (2 individual counters). Action: Exhaust this card and remove 1 individual counter from it → choose 1 card in your hand or in play. That card gains the [[kree]] or [[skrull]] trait until the end of the round.

flavor: "What else do you call a kid who's half-Hulk, half-changeling?" —Kate Bishop
name: Changeling
text: Hulkling gains the [[aerial]] trait. Interrupt: When you use a basic power, exhaust Changeling → you get +1 to that power for this use.

flavor: "I am Dorrek VIII, the once and future King of Space!" —Hulkling
name: Emperor Dorrek-Vell
text:
While you have the [[kree]] trait, each ally you control gets +1 ATK.
While you have the [[skrull]] trait, each ally you control gets +1 THW.

flavor: "I found this in there. Looks like a sword" —Hulkling
name: Excelsior
text: Restricted. (Max 2 restricted cards per player.) While Excelsior is ready, Hulkling's basic attacks gain piercing. Resource: Exhaust Excelsior → generate a [energy] resource.

flavor: "...these are what is left of Captain Marvel's legacy. All I have of him." —Hulkling
name: Nega Rings
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Nega Rings and spend a [energy] resource → choose a card in your hand and swap that card with a card of your choice in your discard pile.

flavor: “Though I was born and bred for war, I have no taste for violance."
name: Lauri-Ell
text: Response: After Lauri-Ell takes any amount of damage from an attack, give her a tough status card.

name: Mur-G'nn
text: Action: Exhaust Mur-G'nn and deal 1 damage to her → discard the top card of your deck. If that card's printed resource has: • [physical] - Ready a card your control. • [energy] - Give an identity a tough status card. • [mental] - Heal 3 damage from a character. Mur-G'nn to your hand. • [wild] - Choose one of the above.

flavor: "Someone is either breaking in or shooting a music video in my apartment." —Hulkling
name: Provoked!
text: Hero Response: After you defend against an attack and take at least 1 damage, ready your hero.

flavor: "Wow...it worked. I can't believe it." —Hulkling
name: Deflect the Blow
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage from an attack, discard Deflect the Blow and exhaust your hero, prevent all of that damage.

flavor: “I may be dishonored, but you are in no way honorable enough to fight against me."
name: Talos
text: Interrupt: When Talos would take any amount of consequential damage, deal that damage to another character you control.

flavor: "I could wish for anything in any world, I could bend reality to all my whims, and when I wake up alone and scared...I only want you." —Wiccan
name: Drunk in Love
text: Action: Confuse your identity → heal 4 damage from it.

name: Strength in Otherness
text: Team-Up (Hulkling and Wiccan). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack/thwart): Remove 1 threat from the main scheme and deal 1 damage to the villain for each different card type in your discard pile.

name: Glorious Flight
text: Play only if you have an [[aerial]] trait. Hero Response: After you defeat an enemy or a side scheme, discard Glorious Flight → ready your hero.

flavor: "I am gay. " —Jean-Paul Beaubier
name: Pride
text: Max 1 per player. Action: Exhaust Pride → discard the top card of your deck. If that card is an identity-specific card, add it to your hand.

flavor: "I am now Lyja… The Lazerfist!!"
name: Lyja
text: Skrull Spy — Action: Spend up to 1[per_hero] resources of any type → search the encounter deck for a [[treachery]] card for each resource spent this way, shuffle the encounter deck, and place those cards on the top of the encounter deck in any order.

flavor: "Out of all the planets in the universe… How is it I keep winding up on this one?"
name: Laura Green
text: Playing Along — Action: Search your deck for a [[treachery]] card, shuffle your deck and place that card on the top of your deck. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: “Man, this has to be my third-worst breakup ever!”
name: Human Torch
text: Response: After Human Torch leaves play, search the encounter deck for a [[treachery]] card, shuffle the encounter deck, and place that card on the top of the encounter deck.

name: Faking Death
text:
Hero Action: Shuffle this card into the encounter deck. When Revealed: Choose to either stun or confuse an enemy.
[star] Boost: The activating enemy gets -2 SCH and -2 ATK for this activation.

name: Feign Loyalty
text:
Hero Action: Shuffle this card into the encounter deck. When Revealed: Discard an attachment with the uses keyword or the text "Hero Action" or "Hero Response" from play.
[star] Boost: Draw 2 cards.

name: Hero Appearance
text:
Hero Action: Shuffle this card into the encounter deck. When Revealed: The Lyja player deals 4 damage among enemies in play.
[star] Boost: The Lyja player deals 3 damage to an enemy.

name: Posing as a Civilian
text:
Hero Action: Shuffle this card into the encounter deck. When Revealed: The Lyja player removes 3 threat from among schemes in play.
[star] Boost: The Lyja player removes 2 threat from a scheme.

flavor: “Try thinking about your life instead of your image!" —Lyja
name: New York Bookstore
text: Laura Green gets +2 REC. Alter-Ego Response: After you make a basic recovery, draw 1 card.

flavor: "Remember how I lost my ability to fire energy blasts? Well, I got it back…" —Lyja
name: Lazerfist
text: Lyja gets +1 ATK. Hero Resource: Exhaust Lazerfist → generate a [energy] resource.

flavor: "﻿They restored power to my hands… Insulated me against heat and fire… And gave me my old ministerial post back." —Lyja
name: Ministerial Tiara
text: Interrupt: When a boost card is turned faceup, if that card has a star icon ([star]) in the boost area, exhaust this card → draw 1 card.

flavor: v
name: Mole
text: Hero Interrupt: When a [[treachery]] card is discarded from the top of the encounter deck, exhaust Mole → resolve that card's "When Revealed" ability.

flavor: "No mere flame cage can hold me! I am now Lyja… The Lazerfist!!" —Lyja
name: Shapeshifter
text: Lyja gets +1 THW. Hero Response: After you play a [[treachery]] event, exhaust Shapeshifter → ready Lyja.

flavor: “It's clobberin' time!"
name: The Thing
text: Toughness. Action: Discard a tough status card from The Thing and choose up to 2 enemies → deal 2 damage to each of them.

flavor: “This is how I want you, unfaithful wretch, on your knees!” —Lyja
name: Going Ballistic
text: Hero Action (attack): Discard your hand. Deal 2 damage to an enemy (to a maximum of 6) for each card discarded this way.

flavor: “Thank me later! Go!” —Lyja
name: Hit the Weak Spot
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to a minion for each icon ([star] and [boost]) in that minion's boost area. This attack gains piercing.

name: Invisible Woman
text: Invisible Woman takes +1 consequential damage for each revelation counter on the target of her basic power. Forced Response: After Invisible Woman uses a basic power, place 1 revelation counter on the target of that power.

flavor: “Nothing is ever what it appears... it's the mysteries and the unknown that make life interesting."
name: Mister Fantastic
text: Resource: Exhaust Mister Fantastic and deal 1 damage to him → generate a [mental] resource.

name: Laser Tag
text: Team-Up (Human Torch and Lyja). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Ready Human Torch, Lyja, and each [[superpower]] upgrade you control.

flavor: The Baxter Building is located in Manhattan. It has been home to the Fantastic Four.
name: Baxter Building
text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 if you control a [[fantastic four]] character. Resource: Exhaust Baxter Building → generate a [wild] resource for any player.

name: Fantasti-Car
text: Response: After Fantasti-Car enters play, ready a [[fantastic four]] card. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Fantasti- Car → choose a player. That player may shuffle 1 card from their discard pile into their deck.

name: Fantastic Four Member
text:
Play only if your identity has the [[fantastic four]] trait.
Attach to a friendly character. Max 1 per character.
Attached character gets +1 hit point and gains the [[fantastic four ]]trait.

flavor: “Do you still want to be a super hero?"
name: Crusader
text: Response: After Crusader enters play, choose a player → deal 1 damage to the villain and each minion engaged with that player. Draw 1 card for each enemy defeated this way.

flavor: “i do not deny it, I simply despise it"
name: Jazinda
text:
Jazinda does not count against your ally limit.
While Jazinda is exhausted, your hero gets +1 THW.

flavor: “The time has come for the Super-Skrull to strike!"
name: Paibok
text: Toughness. [star] Paibok gets +1 THW and +1 ATK for each treachery card attached to him. Response: After a treachery card is discarded, take 1 damage → attach it facedown here (to a maximum of 2).

flavor: “I already lost one home. I will not lose Earth to your petty revolt.”
name: Skymax
text: Response: When Skymax enters play, shuffle all allies from your discard pile into your deck.

flavor: “The time has come for the Super-Skrull to strike!"
name: Super-Skrull
text: [star] Super-Skrull gets +1 THW and +1 ATK for each different [[superpower]] card attached to him. Response: After a [[superpower]] card is placed into a discard pile, attach it facedown here (to a maximum of 4).

flavor: “I'm going to freeze your pathetic little body, then I'm going smash it into little pieces which I'm going to use to keep my drinks cold."
name: War Skrull
text: [star] Response: After "Chilly McHotpants" attacks you, draw 1 cards. If you take no damage from that attack, draw 1 card.

flavor: “My name is Xavin, Super-Skrull-in-training."
name: Xavin
text: Interrupt: When Xavin enters play, discard cards from your deck until you discard an event with a "Hero Action" ability. You may resolve that event's "Hero Action" ability.

name: Buddy Training Program
text: Victory 0. X is equal to the villain's stage number. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may give up to X friendly characters a tough status card.

name: Cloning Program
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may deal up to 3 damage to each [[skrull]] minion engaged with them.

name: Fickle Alliance
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may search the encounter deck for a non-[[elite]] minion and put it into play under their control. (Shuffle.) Treat that minion as an ally with a blank text box (except for [[traits]]). Its THW is equal to its printed SCH and it takes 1 consequential damage . after it thwarts or attacks.

name: Newbie Training
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may defeat a non-[[elite]] [[skrull]] minion and draw 1 card.

name: Searching for Powers
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may search their deck and discard pile for a card with the [[superpower]] trait and play it, ignoring its resource cost. (Shuffle.)

name: Skrull Military Training
text:
Victory 0.
Threat cannot be removed from this scheme unless it is being thwarted by a [[skrull]] ally.
While this card is in the victory display, its owner's hero gets +1 THW, +1 ATK, and +1 DEF.

name: Stealing For Good
text: Victory 0. When Defeated: The player who defeated this scheme may search their deck and discard pile for an upgrade and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.) Then, they remove threat from a scheme equal to that upgrade's printed cost.

flavor: "We can't let fear make us afraid to live."
name: Antalya
text: Action: Exhaust Antalya → heal 1 damage from a friendly character.

flavor: “This is Cadre K. They are an... impure segment of the Skrull population. Like the X-Men of Earth, they were born with powers and abilities beyond the Skrull species.” —K'thron
name: Cadre K
text: Action: Exhaust Cadre K → remove 1 threat from a scheme.

flavor: "So you were saying, "P.O.V." stands for "point of view"? Usually. But in my case, it stands for "Pool-O-Vision". —Deadpool
name: Pool-o-Vision
text: Hero Response: After a [[skrull]] minion is defeated, exhaust "Pool-O-Vision" → draw 1 card (to a maximum of 3) for each [crisis],[acceleration],[amplify], and [hazard] in play.

flavor: “She would have been a powerful leader...might well have brought peace to our warring races." —Mar-Vell
name: Princess Anelle
text: Alliance. X is equal to the total number of players and [[skrull]] enemies in play. Response: After the player phase ends, remove Princess Anelle from the game → skip the villain phase.

flavor: "You know what I am. You've seen what I can do. I wanna be in the Skrull business." —Deadpool
name: Skrull Battleship
text: Play only if you control a [[skrull]] ally. Hero Resource: Exhaust Skrull Battleship → generate a [wild] resource for any player.

flavor: “We're the Skull Kill Krew. This is how we do." —Ryder
name: Skrull Kill Krew
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Skrull Kill Krew → deal 1 damage to a [[skrull]] minion. If that minion is defeated this way, ready Skrull Kill Krew.

name: 3-D Man's Goggles
text: Attach to a non-[[skrull]] ally. Interrupt: When attached ally attacks a [[skrull]] enemy, that ally does not take consequential damage. Googles that let him see and fight your kind over half a century ago!" —3-D Man

flavor: "The Inhibitor mask, It's locked on. I, I can't change." —Empress R'Klll
name: Inhibitor Mask
text:
Attach to a [[skrull]] enemy.
Temporary.
Treat attached enemy's printed text box as if it were blank.

name: Ultimate Nullifier
text:
Attach to a [[skrull]] enemy.
Temporary.
Attached enemy cannot activate.
While Nullifier is attached to the villain, it gains 1[per_hero] hazard icon ([hazard]).

flavor: "I will prove it… by reverting you to your original form." —Super-Skrull
name: Reverting Device
text:
Play under any player's control.
Each [[skrull]] minion engaged with you gets -1 SCH.

name: Skrull Shapeshifter
text: Play under any player's control. Your identity gains the [[skrull]] trait. Interrupt: When you would be defeated, set your hit point dial to 1 instead. Then, discard this card.

name: Sy-Torak Gem
text: Play under any player's control. You get +3 hit points. Your hero gets +1 ATK. Forced Interrupt: When your deck empties, spend [energy] resource. If you cannot, discard Sy-Torak Gem.
